## Summary

Describe the user or data problem and the smallest change that solves it.

## Scope

- Affected app screens, source IDs, workflows, or website routes:
- User-visible behavior:
- Generated files included, if any:

## Validation

- [ ] I ran the relevant repository static checks.
- [ ] I built or tested the affected iOS target when app code changed.
- [ ] I ran `pnpm predeploy:check` when the public site changed.
- [ ] I supplied current official-source evidence for governed data changes.
- [ ] I did not weaken, skip, or allowlist a failing health gate.

List exact commands and results:

## Privacy, rights, and release impact

- [ ] This change contains no personal data, credentials, signing material, or
      unredacted private documents.
- [ ] New media or copied content has documented ownership, license,
      attribution, and redistribution rights; or no such material was added.
- [ ] Product, AI, government-service, and release claims remain evidence-based.
- [ ] I understand that an external code or data contribution requires a
      separate written contributor agreement before merge.

## Screenshots

Attach only when useful. Redact personal data and confirm that every image may
be shared publicly.
